task_completion.description: Verifies the agent logged into the wger fitness manager.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the wger dashboard or navigation menu indicating a successful login (e.g., user profile or logout button visible).

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent navigated to the global exercise database/catalog.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exercise search page, exercise list, or catalog view within the wger interface.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent selected the standard 'Deadlift' exercise and avoided variations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the exercise details page titled exactly 'Deadlift'. Ensure the title does not include variations like 'Romanian Deadlift' or 'Stiff-Legged Deadlift'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the agent entered the correct YouTube URL for the exercise.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a form, modal, or input field for adding a video, containing the exact URL 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wYREQkVtvEc' or the video ID 'wYREQkVtvEc'.

task_completion.description: Verifies the video was successfully saved and linked to the Deadlift exercise.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the YouTube video embedded, a video thumbnail, or a saved link explicitly visible on the 'Deadlift' exercise details page, confirming the attachment was saved.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent used a web browser to interact with the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for a standard web browser interface (e.g., Firefox, Chrome, Chromium) with the address bar showing a localhost URL, rather than terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent interacted with the actual wger web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the authentic wger UI elements, styling, and navigation menus, ensuring the agent is not just editing a local text file or mock HTML page.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the video attachment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's Developer Tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are not open and being used to artificially insert the video thumbnail or text into the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected YouTube video ID to be attached is 'wYREQkVtvEc' (URL: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wYREQkVtvEc). The target exercise must be exactly 'Deadlift' and explicitly not variations like 'Romanian Deadlift'.
